Fabulous views from the top of the waterfront and worth the effort to visit. The wheel goes around numerous times which is good fun. Best to buy your tickets online.
We went at night when the wheel was lit up and didn't have to wait long at all. The ride is smooth and you get awesome views of the skyline. Whether you ride or not, it's a pretty neat attraction.
It was beautiful scenery and very calming for me..the trick is to buy your tickets online though. You go around five or six times..I love going at night, Seattle is beautiful at night..
